- added 节点用橙色 + animate__bounceIn

  "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport \"animate.css\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst jsCode = `// Virtual DOM 本质上是一个 JS 对象\nconst vdom = {\n  type: \"div\",\n  props: { className: \"container\" },\n  children: [\n    {\n      type: \"h1\",\n      props: {},\n      children: [\"Hello, React!\"],\n    },\n    {\n      type: \"p\",\n      props: { id: \"desc\" },\n      children: [\"这是一段描述\"],\n    },\n  ],\n};`;\n\nexport function Step1Vdom({ isActive }: Props) {\n  const anim = isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown\" : \"opacity-0\";\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n      <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n        <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 1 / 6</p>\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">什么是 Virtual DOM？</h2>\n        <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-md text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n          Virtual DOM 是真实 DOM 的轻量 JS 对象描述。React 先在内存中对比两棵 VNode 树，再将最小差异批量更新到真实 DOM。\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"flex w-full max-w-2xl items-start gap-6\">\n        {/* JS 对象 */}\n        <div className={cn(\"flex-1\", anim)} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>\n          <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">JS 对象（VNode）</p>\n          <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n            <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"var(--secondary-bg)\" }}>\n              {jsCode}\n            </SyntaxHighlighter>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 箭头 */}\n        <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col items-center gap-1 pt-12 text-text-secondary\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.3s\" }}>\n          <span className=\"text-xl\">⟶</span>\n          <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary\">render</span>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 真实 DOM */}\n        <div className={cn(\"flex-1\", anim)} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.4s\" }}>\n          <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">真实 DOM</p>\n          <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary p-4 font-mono text-xs text-text-secondary space-y-1 leading-6\">\n            <div><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;div</span> <span className=\"text-amber-600\">class</span>=<span className=\"text-green-600\">&quot;container&quot;</span><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&gt;</span></div>\n            <div className=\"pl-4\"><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;h1&gt;</span>Hello, React!<span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;/h1&gt;</span></div>\n            <div className=\"pl-4\"><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;p</span> <span className=\"text-amber-600\">id</span>=<span className=\"text-green-600\">&quot;desc&quot;</span><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&gt;</span>这是一段描述<span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;/p&gt;</span></div>\n            <div><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;/div&gt;</span></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

{
  "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport \"animate.css\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst code = `function reconcileChildFibers(\n  returnFiber,\n  currentFirstChild,\n  newChild\n) {\n  // ✅ 只处理同层节点，不跨层\n  if (isArray(newChild)) {\n    return reconcileChildrenArray(\n      returnFiber,\n      currentFirstChild,\n      newChild\n    );\n  }\n}`;\n\ntype NodeState = \"normal\" | \"matched\" | \"removed\" | \"added\";\n\nfunction VNode({\n  label,\n  state,\n  delay,\n  isActive,\n}: {\n  label: string;\n  state: NodeState;\n  delay: string;\n  isActive: boolean;\n}) {\n  const base = \"flex h-9 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-[1.5px] font-mono text-xs font-semibold\";\n  const stateClass: Record<NodeState, string> = {\n    normal: \"border-border bg-background-secondary text-text-secondary\",\n    matched: \"border-green-500 bg-green-50 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-950 dark:text-green-400\",\n    removed: \"border-red-400 bg-red-50 text-red-600 line-through dark:bg-red-950 dark:text-red-400\",\n    added: \"border-amber-400 bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400\",\n  };\n\n  const animClass: Record<NodeState, string> = {\n    normal: \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown\",\n    matched: \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown animate__pulse\",\n    removed: \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown animate__shakeX\",\n    added: \"animate__animated animate__bounceIn\",\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <span\n      className={cn(base, stateClass[state], isActive ? animClass[state] : \"opacity-0\")}\n      style={{ animationDelay: delay }}\n    >\n      {label}\n    </span>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function Step2SameLevel({ isActive }: Props) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full gap-0\">\n      {/* 可视化区域 */}\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n        <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 2 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">同层比较策略</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            React 只对比同层级节点，不会跨层移动。<br />相同位置同类型节点复用，否则销毁重建。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-start gap-10\">\n          {/* 旧树 */}\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-2\">\n            <p className=\"text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">旧树 Old</p>\n            <VNode label=\"<A>\" state=\"normal\" delay=\"0.1s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            <div className=\"h-4 w-px bg-border\" />\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <VNode label=\"<B>\" state=\"normal\" delay=\"0.2s\" isActive={isActive} />\n              <VNode label=\"<C>\" state=\"normal\" delay=\"0.3s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 箭头 */}\n          <div\n            className={cn(\"pt-8 text-2xl text-border\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}\n            style={{ animationDelay: \"0.4s\" }}\n          >\n            ⟶\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 新树 */}\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-2\">\n            <p className=\"text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">新树 New</p>\n            <VNode label=\"<A>\" state=\"matched\" delay=\"0.5s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            <div className=\"h-4 w-px bg-border\" />\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <VNode label=\"<B>\" state=\"matched\" delay=\"0.6s\" isActive={isActive} />\n              <VNode label=\"<D>\" state=\"removed\" delay=\"0.75s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 新增 E */}\n          <div\n            className={cn(\"flex flex-col items-center gap-2 self-end\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}\n            style={{ animationDelay: \"0.9s\" }}\n          >\n            <p className=\"text-[10px] tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">新增</p>\n            <VNode label=\"<E>\" state=\"added\" delay=\"1s\" isActive={isActive} />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 图例 */}\n        <div\n          className={cn(\"flex gap-5 text-[11px]\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}\n          style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}\n        >\n          {(\n            [\n              [\"#22c55e\", \"复用节点\"],\n              [\"#ef4444\", \"销毁重建\"],\n              [\"#f59e0b\", \"新增节点\"],\n            ] as const\n          ).map(([color, label]) => (\n            <span key={label} className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 text-text-secondary\">\n              <span\n                className=\"h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-sm border-[1.5px]\"\n                style={{ borderColor: color, background: color + \"20\" }}\n              />\n              {label}\n            </span>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter\n            language=\"javascript\"\n            style={oneLight}\n            customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"transparent\" }}\n          >\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

}

>

> 6. 使用 SyntaxHighlighter（Prism 版本）展示代码 ✅ Line 4, 45
>
> Step-1 checks out completely. Now moving to step-2-same-level.tsx to verify it has the same client-side setup and animation structure with the isActive prop handling.
>
> Checking the VNode component's four state variants and their corresponding animations: matched nodes pulse in green, removed nodes shake in red, and added nodes bounce in orange. The code panel sits on the right side and the legend at the bottom covers all three node types. Let me verify the animation class mapping is set up correctly...
>
> Looking at how the animations are being applied, I see matched, removed, and added states each get their specific animation class. The matched and removed states are combining fadeInDown with pulse and shakeX respectively, which could cause issues since animate.css typically only plays one animation at a time—the first class would take precedence. This might not be a critical problem, but it's worth noting that the intended animations might not display as expected. The CSS animation conflict is a real technical issue—when multiple animation classes are applied, typically only the last one takes effect due to how CSS specificity works, though animate.css might handle this differently. Now I'm tracing through the tree transformation logic to verify the node state assignments: the old tree has A with children B and C, the new tree has A with children B and D plus E as an added sibling, so C should be marked as removed while D appears to be incorrectly labeled as removed when it's actually a new node. I'm realizing the visualization might be showing removal markers in the new tree to indicate what's being replaced—so D appearing with "removed" state could mean the old C at that position is being removed, even though D itself is new. It's a bit confusing from a UX perspective, but it could be intentional design. Now I'm thinking through the animate.css compatibility issue more carefully, particularly around how multiple animations work in v4. classes like `animate__fadeInDown animate__pulse` won't combine - only one animation would play. This IS a technical issue but might result in just the last animation playing.
>
> Actually, in CSS, if two classes both define `animation`, the one that takes precedence depends on specificity and order of definition in the stylesheet. Both `animate__fadeInDown` and `animate__pulse` would have the same specificity (each adds one animation property), and in CSS the last property wins if specificity is equal. However, since these are class selectors and animate.css defines them separately, the one that appears later in the CSS file would win.
>
> This is a subtle issue. Let me summarize my findings:
>
> **step-1-vdom.tsx: All requirements met ✅**
>
> **step-2-same-level.tsx:**
> - Most requirements met ✅
> - ⚠️ Minor issue with combined animation classes - animate.css doesn't support stacking multiple animations, so only the last one defined in the stylesheet will actually play. For the `matched` nodes, this means the `pulse` effect that should distinguish them might get overridden by `fadeInDown` instead.
> - The `<D>` node being shown as "removed" in the new tree is likely an intentional UX choice to represent that the old node at this position has been removed.
>
> **Color scheme verification:**
> - Removed (red) ✅
> - Added (amber/orange) ✅  
> - Matched (green) ✅
> - Legend matches ✅
>
> **Semantic issue with `<D>`:** The node is marked as "removed" in the new tree, but D is actually new—it's the old C that was removed. This seems to be a design choice to indicate the slot was destroyed and rebuilt, but it's semantically incorrect since D shouldn't carry the "removed" state. The spec doesn't explicitly address this scenario, so it's ambiguous whether this is intentional or a bug.
>
> **Animation verification:** The `<E>` added node correctly uses `state="added"` with the `animate__bounceIn` animation as specified ✅. The `<D>` node has `state="removed"` which doesn't match the spec's intent for new nodes.
>
> There's a potential semantic mismatch here that's worth noting, though it could be a deliberate design decision to show the comparison result rather than strict semantic accuracy. The spec only defines the styling for removed nodes but doesn't specify which nodes should receive that state, so this is really a design decision rather than a spec violation. The VNode component itself handles all four states correctly with the proper styles and animations, so the implementation is sound. Looking at my findings, step-1-vdom.tsx meets all requirements, but step-2-same-level.tsx has a technical issue where combined animation classes are being applied—only one animation will actually play due to CSS conflicts, likely whichever has higher specificity or appears last in the cascade.

## 审查结果

---

| isActive=false → opacity-0 | ✅ L28, 32, 52 |

---

### step-2-same-level.tsx — ⚠️ 1 个技术问题 + 1 个语义问题

**✅ 通过的项：**
- `"use client"` + `import "animate.css"` (L1–2)
- `{ isActive: boolean }` props (L7, 62)
- 四种 NodeState 类型定义 (L24)
- matched 绿色、removed 红色、added 橙色配色 (L40–42)
- 右侧代码面板 + SyntaxHighlighter (L139–151)
- 底部图例（复用/销毁/新增）(L121–135)

---

**❌ 关键问题 1：animate.css 动画类冲突（L47–48）**

```47:49:.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/step-2-same-level.tsx
    matched: "animate__animated animate__fadeInDown animate__pulse",
    removed: "animate__animated animate__fadeInDown animate__shakeX",
    added: "animate__animated animate__bounceIn",
```

`animate__fadeInDown` 和 `animate__pulse` / `animate__shakeX` 同时存在时，CSS `animation` 属性只有最后声明的生效（animate.css 不原生支持组合动画）。实际结果：

- `matched` 节点：`pulse` 效果可能不会播放（被 `fadeInDown` 覆盖或反之），丢失绿色脉冲的视觉区分
- `removed` 节点：`shakeX` 可能不会播放，丢失红色抖动效果

规格要求 matched 用 `animate__pulse`、removed 用 `animate__shakeX` 作为**区分特征**，但组合写法使结果不可预期。

**修复建议**：入场动画用 CSS transition 或延迟 class 替换，保留 `animate__pulse` / `animate__shakeX` 作为唯一动画类。

---

**⚠️ 语义问题（L102，可接受但值得确认）**

```100:103:.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/step-2-same-level.tsx
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <VNode label="<B>" state="matched" delay="0.6s" isActive={isActive} />
              <VNode label="<D>" state="removed" delay="0.75s" isActive={isActive} />
            </div>
```

`<D>` 出现在**新树**中却标记为 `state="removed"`（红色删除线）。被移除的节点是旧树中的 `<C>`，`<D>` 实际是新建节点，语义上应为 `added`。这会向学习者传递错误的 Diff 概念。

不过如果设计意图是"此位置的旧节点被销毁、新节点从零构建"的合并视图，属于设计选择，可接受。建议确认设计意图。

---

### 总结

| 文件 | 结论 |
|---|---|
| `step-1-vdom.tsx` | ✅ 完全符合规格 |
| `step-2-same-level.tsx` | ❌ 动画类冲突（L47–48）需修复；⚠️ `<D>` 语义待确认 |

---
